message:
fix: align rewards scoring scope with leaderboard (4 repos, not all org) (#3472)

The console default REWARDS_GITHUB_ORGS was "org:kubestellar" which
counted contributions across ALL repos in the org, while the external
leaderboard only counts 4 repos (console, console-marketplace,
console-kb, docs). This caused inflated point totals in the dashboard.

Fixes #3463

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
